elements.title: the church
elements.contents: ... that the church (pictured) of Charlotte's oldest black Baptist congregation was designed by its first black mayor?

elements.title: Professor Oak
elements.contents: ... that NBA commissioner Adam Silver appeared in a video for the Chicago Bulls as a parody of the character Professor Oak?

elements.contents: ... that the Geneva Peace Congress sought to establish a United States of Europe in 1867?

elements.contents: ... that minister Charles A. Hill was targeted by the House Un-American Activities Committee for his anti-war activism?

elements.title: Chinatown Storytelling Centre
elements.contents: ... that visitors to the Chinatown Storytelling Centre can listen to the personal stories of locals inside a pagoda phone booth?

elements.title: Liechtenstein has won all of its Olympic medals
elements.contents: ... that Liechtenstein has won all of its Olympic medals at the Winter Olympics?

elements.title: Susana Freydoz
elements.contents: ... that one of the judges in the trial of Susana Freydoz voted to convict her of magnicide instead of aggravated murder?

elements.title: Smeargle
elements.contents: ... that the Pokémon species Smeargle had been banned from multiple competitive tournaments due to being able to learn almost any move in the series?
